title: Pedro Y Pablo
original_title: La Historia De Pedro y Pablo
overview: After the tragic loss of their parents, two inseparable brothers are forced to confront a harsh reality. Struggling to survive with little food and mounting bills, Pedro, the older brother, makes a painful decision — he will cross the border illegally in search of work so his younger brother can continue his education.  The journey is dangerous, but Pedro manages to find employment as a servant for a wealthy family in the city. As the brothers live apart, each faces new hardships, unexpected opportunities, and emotional challenges.  While Pedro begins to build a new life — and even finds himself drawn into a romantic relationship — he is torn between love and his responsibility to his brother.  Separated by distance and circumstance, the question remains: will Pedro return home to the life he left behind, or will his new future keep the brothers apart forever?
